  configFile=.storyboard/terminals/agent-yv0tfr.json serverUrl=http://localhost:1237 вЂ”

  identity. The system note says "this is a configuration step, no response needed." I 
  should wait for the user to send an actual message.

  about terminal identity being set. The note says "no response needed." I should simply
  acknowledge I'm ready.
